hero.subtitle: A New Paradigm in Reading
hero.description: Transform complex technical documents, papers, and tutorials into interactive, spatial knowledge graphs. Experience clarity through visual organization.

problem.subtitle: The Problem
problem.quote1: "We consume complex architectures through a medium designed for
problem.quote3: It is time to break the scroll."
problem.description: Traditional reading fails when dealing with multi-layered technical information. We continuously lose context, forgetting definitions from three pages prior while struggling to build a mental map of the system.

cases.subtitle: Where complexity demands structure.
cases.case1_desc: Deconstruct monolithic codebases. Trace function calls and database schemas across multiple files visually, maintaining a living map of the system's topology.
cases.case2_desc: Cross-reference citations, experimental methodologies, and statistical analyses simultaneously. Never lose the core thesis while diving into the appendices.
cases.case3_desc: Map out multi-jurisdictional compliance requirements. Visually connect clauses, exceptions, and precedential rulings into a cohesive argument.
cases.case4_desc: Synthesize disparate earnings reports, analyst notes, and macroeconomic data points into a singular truth graph for faster executive decision-making.

features.subtitle: Designed for cognitive ergonomics.
features.feat1_desc: Escape the constraints of top-to-bottom reading. Map out concepts on an infinite digital canvas that scales organically with your understanding.
features.feat2_desc: Highlight source materials effortlessly. AI instantly retrieves context and reframes it with intuitive analogies and simplified summaries.
features.feat3_desc: Freely arrange, combine, and organize notes. When you're finished, compile your curated insights directly into standard Markdown.

metrics.quote1: "We have entered an era where reading

methodology.title: The Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Phase 01 — 04
methodology.phase1_desc: Provide a technical document, a heavy documentation portal URL, or a robust research paper. Our parsing engine digests the raw, unstructured data immediately.
methodology.phase2_desc: Powered by advanced language models, the content is fractured into core principles, variable definitions, and code blocks. We isolate the signal from the noise.
methodology.phase3_desc: Concepts are projected onto an absolute canvas. You explore nodes spatially, drawing edge connections between related ideas, tracking references visually without ever scrolling backwards.
methodology.phase4_desc: Select and curate the exact notes and graphs you need. Export the newly assembled knowledge base directly to a pristine, universally consumable Markdown format.

cta.description: Join the workspace and begin transforming opaque documents into crystal-clear structural models.
